race_meta.race_name: DragonBet The Roar Before Cheltenham Infernoboosts Handicap Hurdle

ruby.title: Probability Analysis
ruby.insight: Model ranked knight templar at position 5 with only 7.0% probability. Top pick was Postponed Legacy (32.0%). Analysis missed key factors driving the winning horse's form.

keenan.title: Forecast & Distribution
keenan.insight: Top forecast prediction was Postponed Legacy > Siam Park, but actual result was Knight Templar > Tilehurst. Distribution model underestimated variance in placing combinations.

mordin.title: Market Alignment
mordin.insight: Winner Knight Templar had well-aligned model/market values (divergence -2.1%). Market pricing efficient for this outcome.
